holdings.infoBox: GSGO is an equity ETF with a total of 56 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.11%, Microsoft at 8.82%, Apple at 6.67%, Alphabet at 5.16%, and Amazon.com at 4.74%.

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Growth Opportunities ETF (GSGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in stocks of US companies of any market capitalization. Positions are selected and weighted based on the proprietary growth and valuation metrics GSGO was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.
